---
title: "Course Participation Certificate"
format: pdf
---

\vspace{2cm}

# Course Participation Certificate

\vspace{1cm}

This is to certify that

\vspace{0.5cm}

## **[PARTICIPANT NAME]**

\vspace{0.5cm}

has successfully completed the 1-day intensive workshop

\vspace{0.3cm}

# Introduction to Git & GitHub

\vspace{0.3cm}

held on **9 July 2026**

\vspace{1cm}

---

**Learning Outcomes:**

- Understand version control principles and Git/GitHub fundamentals
- Execute local Git workflows and collaborate via GitHub
- Manage branches, resolve conflicts, and navigate history
- Apply version control to research and collaborative projects

\vspace{1.5cm}

---

**Awarded by:**

Comprehensive Cancer Center Zurich (CCCZ)  
University of Zurich (UZH)  
University Hospital Zurich (USZ)

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Instructor:**  
Deepak Tanwar

\vspace{0.3cm}

*Swiss Institute of Bioinformatics (SIB)*

\vspace{1cm}

---

*For ECTS credits (0.25 ECTS), exam passage required.*
